ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller model */,
  "mc_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller's features */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the microcontroller */,
  "max_flash_size" INTEGER /* Maximum flash memory size in KB */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the microcontroller */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the microcontroller (e.g., ATtiny) */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line associated with the microcontroller */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the microcontroller (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lock_bits" (
  "lock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lock bit configuration */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller model */,
  "bit_7" INTEGER /* Value of lock bit 7 */,
  "bit_6" INTEGER /* Value of lock bit 6 */,
  "bit_5" INTEGER /* Value of lock bit 5 */,
  "bit_4" INTEGER /* Value of lock bit 4 */,
  "bit_3" INTEGER /* Value of lock bit 3 */,
  "bit_2" TEXT /* Value of lock bit 2 */,
  "bit_1" TEXT /* Value of lock bit 1 */,
  "bit_0" INTEGER /* Value of lock bit 0 */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lock bit configuration */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the configuration */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lock_bits_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change history entry */,
  "lock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lock bit configuration being changed */,
  "changed_on" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_lock_id FOREIGN KEY ("lock_id") REFERENCES lock_bits ("lock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration template */,
  "mc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microcontroller model */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of what the template does */,
  "template_data" TEXT /* Configuration data represented as a string */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the template */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the template */,
  "last_modified_on" TEXT /* Date when the template was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_templates_mc_id FOREIGN KEY ("mc_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's privileges */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
